roa.docketEntryComment: DFT'S ATC FOR MOT RBW FILED
PPLS BRIEFING ON MOT TO REINSTATE ERRONEOUSLY DISM CASE, FILED

/CAL: DEFENSE ADD TO CALENDAR FOR MOTION TO RECALL BENCH WARRANT/CTORD:MATTER OFF CALENDAR FOR THE FOLLOWING REASON: NO BENCH WARRANT OUTSTANDING,  CASE DISMISSED ON 04-21-21 IN DEPT 22 PURSUANT TO FEDERAL INDICTMENT,/

/CAL: SHERIFF'S AFFIDAVIT WARRANT, NON COMPLIANCE/CTORD: SHERIFF'S AFFIDAVIT WARRANT IS DISCHARGED/ACM/DTC/RX/WEAP/SAORD/SA2: AREA BOUNDED BY POLK(WEST) AND 10TH (WEST), HOWARD (SOUTH), 7TH STREETAND JONES STREETS (EAST), GEARY (NORTH) AND THE 300 BLOCK OF GOLDEN GATE/,/X:AS A CONDITION OF RELEASE, THE DEFENDANT SHALL BE PLACED ON PRE-TRIAL MONITORING BY THE SHERIFF'S DEPARTMENT,/DEF:SHALL BE FITTED WITH A GPS DEVICE,AND IS ORDERED TO COMPLY WITH ALL TERMS OF RELEASE AS SET FORTH ON THE RECORD AND BY THE SFSD/CTORD:DEFENDANT IS TO REPORT TO 70 OAK GROVE BY 12:00 PM ON THE NEXT BUSINESSDAY/OR/CTORD:DEFENDANT SHALL BE RELEASED WITH COORDINATED PICK-UP/X:SEE SIGNED ORDER IN FILE,/X: FUTURE DATES ARE CONFIRMED/
/DAWT/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG/PD/FAW/DEFTARR/X:THE DEFENSE RESERVES THE RIGHT TO DEMURRER,/NTW/LDTR: 10-13-20/CONTD: STATUS-TO JOIN 20003649 ON 08-27-20 AND TRIAL ON 09-25-20/DOP/

/CAL:PRELIMINARY HEARING/INTC/X:CERTIFIED LAW CLERK KELSEY WOODEL SPECIALLY APPEARS UNDER THE SUPERVISION OF ERIC FLEISCHAKER/WITEXCL:DEFENSE/INVOFF:JAMES PUCCINELLI/WIT SWORN DA:JAMES PUCCINELLI,SFPD/EXHMA:PEOPLE'S 1, ACLEAR ENVELOPE CONTAINING SMALLER ENVELOPES OF SUSPECTED NARCOTICS, WITH PAPERWORK ATTACHED/EXHMA:PEOPLE'S 1(A), AN ENVELOPE CONTAINING SUSPECTED FENTANYL/EXHMA:PEOPLE'S 1(B), AN ENVELOPE CONTAINING SUSPECTED HEROIN/EXHMA:PEOPLE'S 1(C), AN ENVELOPE CONTAINING SUSPECTED ALPRAZOLAM/EXHMA:PEOPLE'S1(D), AN ENVELOPE CONTAINING SUSPECTED METHAMPHETAMINE/EXHMA:PEOPLE'S 1(E), A SECOND ENVELOPE CONTAINING SUSPECTED FENTANYL/X:IN CAMERA HEARING CONDUCTED AS TO OFFICER PUCCINELLI'S ASSERTION OF PRIVILEGED INFORMATION, THE COURT SEALS THIS PORTION OF THE TRANSCRIPT AND PROCEEDINGS/EXHM:PEOPLE'S 2,A FILED ENDORSED COPY OF A STAY-AWAY ORDER DATED 01-13-20IN CASE NO 20000190/X:THE PEOPLE REQUEST JUDICIAL NOTICE OF THE COURT MINUTES OF 01-13-20 IN CASE NO 20000190/X:EXHIBITS MARKED AND ADMITTED INTO EVIDENCE, ARE ORDERED RETURNED/X:TO THE OFFERING PARTY PENDING FURTHER ORDER OF COURT,/HTA1:001, 002, 003 AND 004/X:COUNT 005 IS HEREBY CERTIFIED AS A MISDEMEANOR/X:DEFENDANT SHALL REMAIN OUT OF CUSTODY ON ACM/CONTD:ARRAIGNMENT ON THE INFORMATION IN DEPT 22/DOP/

/CAL: ARRAIGNMENT/INTC/PD/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG/FAWC/DEFTARR1/X: THE DEFENSE RESERVES THE RIGHT TO DEMURRER,/NTW/LDPX:07-14-20(30TH DAY)/987,2/CAUSE1/ACM/X:AS A CONDITION OF RELEASE, THE DEFENDANT SHALL BE PLACED ON PRE-TRIAL  MONITORING BY THE SHERIFF'S DEPARTMENT,/DEF:SHALL BE PLACED ON AND FITTED WITH A GPS AND IS ORDERED TO COMPLY WITHALL TERMSOF RELEASE AS SET FORTH ON THE RECORD AND BY THE SFSD/CTORD:DEFENDANT ISTO REPORT TO 70 OAK GROVE BY 12:00 PM ON THE NEXT BUSINESS DAY/WEAP/RX/X:SEE SIGNED ORDER IN FILE,/SAORD/SA2: 300 GOLDEN GATE AVE, SF/SAORD3/CONTD: PRELIMINARY HEARING,  07-10-20/DOP/
/CAL:TO SET JURY TRIAL/INTC/CONT/DOPU:IN CONTACT WITH COUNSEL/
/CAL:SHERIFF'S AFFIDAVIT WARRANT/INTC/X:SHERIFF'S AFFIDAVIT WARRANT IS DISCHARGED BY THE COURT/ /EMTERM/ACM/CONTD: TO SET TRIAL/DOC/
/CAL:STATUS, TO JOIN #20003649/X:LD OF 10-13-20 & TRIAL IS VACATED/GTW/VD:09-25-20/CONTD:TO SET TRIAL/
